text.title: Slash-Command Surface for PR Review Bots Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable bot/repo signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: enable auto_describe + auto_review on PR events
keep auto_improve=false; rely on /improve PR comment
wire issue_comment dispatcher so users can request

example.trace: eligible=true → auto_default=true → auto-describe-on → workflow sets auto_describe + auto_review true on PR open

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
